evals.prompt: 分析这个adump代码库的软件架构，重点关注exception dump的实现机制，特别是aic_err_detail_dump的实现
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive architecture analysis covering: overall codebase structure, key components (DumpManager, ExceptionDumper, DumpOperator, DumpArgs), three exception dump levels (L0/L1/L2), detailed analysis of aic_err_detail_dump implementation including data flow, memory management, and platform-specific features

evals.prompt: 我需要了解adump代码库中tensor dump的工作原理，包括正常数据dump和异常dump的区别，以及不同级别的exception dump是如何实现的
evals.expected_output: Detailed explanation of tensor dump functionality covering: normal data dump vs exception dump, three exception dump levels (aic_err_brief_dump, aic_err_norm_dump, aic_err_detail_dump), their implementations, use cases, and technical differences

evals.prompt: 帮我分析adump代码库中aic_err_detail_dump的详细实现，包括内存管理、数据流、以及与DumpManager和ExceptionDumper的交互
evals.expected_output: Deep technical analysis of aic_err_detail_dump implementation focusing on: memory management (ring buffers, chunk allocation), data flow from exception callback to file I/O, integration with DumpManager and ExceptionDumper, thread safety mechanisms, and platform-specific optimizations
